eligibil.org este platforma AI care ajut: eligib.org is the AI ​​platform that helps startups and SMEs from Moldova, Romania and Eastern Europe find grants, non-dilutive capital, consortium partners and prepare their funding applications.

Fiecare grant, partener, eveniment trece: Every grant, partner, event goes through a verification process. Errors are corrected quickly and transparently.
Catalogul, glosarul și informațiile de b: The catalog, glossary, and basic information are free. Account required only for personalized AI analyses.
Documentele tale (pitch deck, whitepaper: Your documents (pitch deck, whitepaper) remain encrypted, accessible only from your account. We do not share them with anyone without your explicit consent.
Acoperim deopotrivă programe naționale (: We cover both national (ANCD, Innofund, USAID, GIZ) and European (EIC, Horizon, ERDF) programs. Interface in RO, EN, RU, UA.

Acceleratoarele, fondurile și partenerii: Accelerators, funds and partners can list their profile for free. Win-win partnership with the ecosystem, not a closed silo.

TRL (Technology Readiness Level) este sc: TRL (Technology Readiness Level) is the technology maturity scale used by the EU, NASA, NSF and almost all deep tech funders. Most large programs have strict minimum TRL requirements. If you don't know where you are, you don't know what you can apply for.
EIC Transition, NSF SBIR Phase I: EIC Transition, NSF SBIR Phase I
eligibil.org combină cel mai complet cat: eligib.org combines the most comprehensive financing catalog for Eastern Europe with an AI analysis engine that transforms a list of opportunities into a personalized plan. Use either mode — or both.
Sistemul extrage TRL + profil complet: The system extracts TRL + full profile
Finanțare combinată grant + equity pentr: Combined grant + equity funding for deep-tech startups with disruptive impact at European level. The largest innovation program in the EU.
EIC Accelerator finanțează startup-uri ș: The EIC Accelerator funds startups and SMEs with innovative technologies (TRL 5–8) and global growth ambitions. The program offers a unique combination of a non-repayable grant of up to €2.5M for innovation activities and equity investment of up to €15M through the EIC Fund for scaling.
Țintele primare sunt deep-tech, climate,: The primary targets are deep-tech, climate, biotech, semiconductors, critical AI and security. The EU is looking for "European champions" capable of competing globally with firms from the US and Asia.
Trecerea de la prototip la primul produs: Moving from prototype to the first scalable product on the European or global market.
Construirea capacității de operare și pr: Building operating and production capacity for international demand.
Protejarea proprietății intelectuale și: Protecting intellectual property and strengthening competitive advantage.
Reducerea dependenței UE de tehnologii n: Reducing the EU's dependence on non-European technologies in critical areas.
Startup sau IMM înregistrat în UE / Asoc: Startup or SME registered in the EU / Associate
Țări asociate: UK, Israel, Norvegia, Mol: Associated countries: UK, Israel, Norway, Moldova (from 2024)

Echipă fondatoare cu cel puțin 2 persoan: Founding team with at least 2 people
Demonstrabil prin TAM, scalabilitate, GT: Demonstrable through TAM, scalability, GTM strategy
Verificare automată din ultimul bilanț: Automatic check from the last balance sheet
Inovativitate, ambiție tehnologică, dife: Innovation, technological ambition, differentiation from SOTA, scientific quality.
Potențial economic, social, de mediu. St: Economic, social, environmental potential. GTM strategy, EU/global scalability.
Calitatea echipei, plan de lucru, eficie: Team quality, work plan, cost efficiency, execution capacity.
Aplicarea EIC ne-a forțat să clarificăm: The application of the EIC forced us to clarify the European GTM. The grant came, but the real value was the framework.
Step 2 e brutal. Pregătirea pitch-ului d: Step 2 is brutal. Preparing the pitch in Brussels took the founding team 3 weeks.
Lipsă patent application. Generăm un dra: No patent application required. We generate a strategy draft in 5 minutes based on your whitepaper.
Secțiunea Impact e thin. Aplican­ții reu: The Impact section is thin. Successful applicants have detailed plans in 3 key markets with pricing and sales motion.
Video-ul tău e din 2024. Refresh cu metr: Your video is from 2024. Refresh with current metrics (MRR, customer logos) for +4 Confidence points.
Cel mai accesibil program de finanțare p: The most affordable funding program for tech startups in Moldova. 200K MDL non-refundable + mentoring + access to the national accelerator.
Startup Moldova este programul-flagship: Startup Moldova is the flagship program of the government of the Republic of Moldova to support the tech entrepreneurial ecosystem. Published annually since 2024, it finances Moldovan-resident startups, in early or pre-seed stage, with products with export potential.
Procesul e simplificat față de programel: The process is simplified compared to EU programs: one application, decision in 8 weeks, payment in 2 installments. Beneficiaries receive bonus access to the national acceleration program.
Crearea de oportunități pentru fondatori: Creating opportunities for founders and engineers to stay in the country.
Susținerea companiilor cu potențial de v: Supporting companies with potential income from external businesses (B2B SaaS, IT services).
Atragerea fondatorilor din diaspora pent: Attracting diaspora founders to relocate tech HQs to Moldova.

Diferențierea produsului, componenta tec: Product differentiation, tech component, potential IP.

Locuri de muncă create, relocare diaspor: Jobs created, diaspora relocation, potential export.
Banii ne-au dat 12 luni runway. Mai impo: The money gave us 12 months of runway. More importantly: the network of mentors and access to private funds in RO/EU.
The application was surprisingly simple. 3 weeks of preparation, clear evaluation based on public criteria.
Lipsă din checklist. Generează cerere au: Missing from the checklist. Generate automatic request — 24h response from AGEPI.
Componenta de impact local punctează put: The local impact component scores strongly through export revenue. Adds RO/UA pipeline.

Programul de accelerare al ecosistemului: Moldova Growth Plan ecosystem acceleration program. 3–4 month cohorts, mentoring, Demo Day, and access to investor network. Natively integrated with eligibil.org.
Cel mai mare finanțator public european: The largest European public funder for deep tech. Accelerator (€2.5M grant + €15M equity), Pathfinder (€3–4M consortium), Transition.
eligibil.org este un agregator de surse: eligibil.org is a funding source aggregator that makes it easy to find relevant programs for your startup, based on country, sector, funding type, and stage. Each opportunity includes full metadata — eligibility, amount, deadline, criteria — and can be analyzed by AI to calculate your fit and readiness score.
Trebuie să plătesc pentru a folosi eligi: Do I have to pay to use eligibil.org?
Răsfoirea catalogului este 100% gratuită: Browsing the catalog is 100% free, no account required. Creating a user account gives you benefits — opportunity saving, deadline notifications, application history. AI analysis (Match, Readiness, Confidence + document generation) is in free beta now.
Poți recomanda programul potrivit pentru: Can you recommend the right program for my goals?
Ca agregator, eligibil.org nu oferă cons: As an aggregator, eligibil.org does not provide direct financial advice. However, we do offer a vast collection of sources filterable by multiple criteria and an AI scoring system that calculates your suitability for each program. The final decision is yours — however, we recommend consulting an advisor before applying to dilutive programs.
Cum vă asigurați că informațiile sunt ac: How do you ensure that the information is up to date?
Folosim monitorizare automată zilnică (c: We use daily automated monitoring (crawlers that check official websites and detect changes), collaboration with program representatives (verified partners maintain their profiles), community feedback (anyone can report inaccuracies or new programs), and periodic quarterly auditing.
Cum sunt selectate programele din catalo: How are the programs in the catalog selected?
Adăugăm programe publice naționale (MD,: We add national public programs (MD, RO, EU, USA), EU programs (Horizon, EIC, Interreg, Erasmus+), corporate competitions, verified accelerators, investment funds with a track record, and non-dilutive capital sources. Each addition goes through manual verification.
Din ce regiuni sunt listate programele?: From which regions are the programs listed?
Acoperire globală cu focus regional pe M: Global coverage with regional focus on Moldova, Romania, Central and Eastern Europe, full EU-27, USA (federal SBIR/STTR + state programs), and selective Global. We are constantly expanding into the Caucasus, Balkans, and Central Asia.
Trebuie să am cont pentru a folosi platf: Do I need to have an account to use the platform?
Nu pentru răsfoirea catalogului. Da pent: Not for browsing the catalog. Yes for: AI analysis of your startup, saving favorites, deadline alerts, pipeline tracking, and AI document generation.
Ce primesc ca accelerator sau fond dacă: What do I get as an accelerator or fund if I list?
Profil gratuit complet (logo, descriere,: Free full profile (logo, description, active calls), "Verified" badge, priority appearance in relevant searches, access to analytics about interested founders, and — optionally — integration with the AI ​​matching system that sends you pre-qualified applicants.
Am găsit o informație incorectă sau lips: I found incorrect or missing information. What do I do?
Trimite-ne un mesaj la info@eligibil.org: Send us a message at info@eligibil.org or use the "Report" button on any opportunity card. Any report is verified within 48 hours.
În ce limbi funcționează platforma?: In what languages ​​does the platform work?
Română · Engleză · Rusă · Ucraineană. An: Romanian · English · Russian · Ukrainian. AI analysis of artifacts (deck, video, whitepaper) works regardless of the language of the document.
Cum sunt protejate datele startupului me: How is my startup's data protected?
Datele încărcate pentru analiză AI nu su: Data uploaded for AI analysis is not shared with third parties and is not used for AI training without explicit consent. Browsing the catalog is anonymous and does not require an account.
Actualizate zilnic · 4 limbi · Gratuit p: Updated daily · 4 languages ​​· Free to browse
